discrepancies.expected: SDTM and ADaM subject counts should be reconciled in documentation
discrepancies.actual: 306 (SDTM DM) vs 254 (ADaM ADSL) flagged as discrepancy
discrepancies.description: Subject count difference is expected (52 screen failures excluded from ADaM) but documentation does not clearly state this

discrepancies.expected: ARMCD uses standardized CDISC submission values
discrepancies.actual: ARMCD uses Pbo/Xan_Lo/Xan_Hi which differs from some documentation referencing numeric codes 0/54/81
discrepancies.description: Documentation inconsistency between ARMCD character values (Pbo/Xan_Lo/Xan_Hi) and TRT01PN numeric codes (0/54/81)

discrepancies.expected: USUBJID format consistently documented as SITEID-SUBJID pattern
discrepancies.actual: USUBJID format mismatch found in some documentation sections
discrepancies.description: USUBJID format (XX-XXX-XXXX) is documented inconsistently across specification files
